name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-54
title: Several helper Python scripts crash on missing argv (no usage/range check)
description: scripts/rabbit-project-set-path.py and rabbit-project-map.py and rabbit-project-consolidate.py access sys.argv[1], [2], [3] directly with no validation. Invoking any of them with too few args raises IndexError with a traceback rather than printing a usage line and exiting 2. generate-claude-md-header.py is the same (sys.argv[1] without check). build-targets.py is also positional-only (sys.argv[1], [2], [3]). Although these scripts are 'helpers' invoked by other scripts, defensive usage handling helps debugging and matches the contract's stated exit codes (0=ok 1=error).

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
